steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We're given that 1 leuga = 7,500 pedes. To convert 3.8 leugas to pedes, multiply by this conversion factor.

steps.title: Multiply to find the equivalent pedes
steps.content: The number of pedes equivalent to 3.8 leugas is: $$3.8 \times 7,500 = 28,500$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $28500$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $28500$.
